calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Two Irrevocable Trusts Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evan Abrams for (petitioner & trustee) Michael Korbholz.

Mr. Abrams stated that Mr. Korbholz is retired and residing in Palo Alto that the trust is being administered by an associate of the firm and his secretary and that the bulk of the trust (corporations) has been sold and there is primarily cash in the account. The petition to terminate two irrevocable trusts, etc., was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)
